name: Friendship Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg and mix until well blended.
3. Stir in the mashed bananas and starter.
4. Add the vanilla extract or grated orange rind.
5. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
9. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the bread to cool before slicing.
